command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/check_gateway_svc.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Check the system service file to see how env is loaded
cat /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service
echo ===
# Check if there is a gateway env file
cat /home/jose/.hermes/gateway.env 2>/dev/null || echo no_gateway_env
cat /home/jose/.hermes/.env | grep -v '#' | grep -v '^$'
SHEOF
bash /tmp/check_gateway_svc.sh"
